# Bilen Auto CMS

> PHP car listings marketplace demo for Norway, Europe and Ukraine — cars, license plates, special equipment, VIN search, public listing submission, Schema.org SEO and 4 languages.

## Product
- Name: Bilen Auto CMS (Bilen CMS)
- Type: PHP car classifieds / auto marketplace script
- Languages: Ukrainian, English, Russian, Norwegian
- Developer: [Ruslan Bilohash](https://bilohash.com/resume.php), Drammen, Norway
- Contact: [bilohash.com](https://bilohash.com/)

## Key URLs
- [Live demo — cars catalog](https://bilohash.com/tavle/site/)
- [Product landing](https://bilohash.com/tavle/)
- [License plates catalog](https://bilohash.com/tavle/site/plates/)
- [Special equipment catalog](https://bilohash.com/tavle/site/special/)
- [Add listing (no signup)](https://bilohash.com/tavle/site/add.php)
- [My listings](https://bilohash.com/tavle/site/my-listings.php)
- [Admin demo](https://bilohash.com/tavle/site/admin/) — login: demo / demo2026
- [Sitemap](https://bilohash.com/tavle/site/sitemap.xml)
- [Domain LLM context](https://bilohash.com/llms.txt)

## Demo dealer
- Global Motors — Drammen, Norway (fictional demo dealership)

## SEO & structured data
- Schema.org: WebSite, Organization, AutoDealer, SoftwareApplication, Car, Product, VehicleListing, Offer, BreadcrumbList, ItemList
- Open Graph, Twitter Cards, hreflang (uk, en, ru, no), canonical URLs, geo tags

## Commercial intent
- Order car marketplace website development Norway
- Auto classifieds CMS Europe
- PHP car listings script with admin panel
- Dealership website, license plate marketplace, special equipment listings

## Tech
- PHP 8+, SQLite, modular i18n, responsive marketplace CSS
- Features: brand/model filters, pagination, galleries, dealer profiles, cookie consent
- Public listing: auto-account on submit, edit via my-listings

- [Auction CMS](https://bilohash.com/auction/)
- [Shop CMS](https://bilohash.com/shop/)
- [Booking CMS](https://bilohash.com/booking/)
- [AI Platform](https://bilohash.com/ai/)
- [mapsme.no](https://mapsme.no)
